creator: joseph@randomnetworks.com
text:
PORT-FIX-MAINTAINER TIMEOUT : misc/seizedesktop

        According to :

http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/portsurvey/bad.html

the FreeBSD port misc/seizedesktop has an unfetchable distfile.  After
doing some looking around I found that the directory had changed.  I put
together a very simple patch to fix this at :

http://www.randomnetworks.com/freebsd/prs/seizedesktop.diff

** NOTE **
I sent the above in an email to the maintainer, kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp,
on 7 Jan 2001 and have yet to recieve a response.

Fix: This diff was generated by : diff -ruN seizedesktop seizedesktop.new
From : /usr/ports/misc
Also at : http://www.randomnetworks.com/freebsd/prs/seizedesktop.diff
----------------------------------------------------------------
